name: com.melowrite.audio
description: Play Melowrite project files in Unity. Real-time sequencer with synths, samplers, SoundFont playback, and effects. Windows desktop only.

samples.description: A playable scene that switches between two songs at runtime (Now / Bar / crossfade / fade) with volume + tempo sliders. Includes both .melo projects, their samples, soundfont, impulses, and the UI sprites.
